system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.description: Extract mid-band identifier values from haystack
args.prompt:
Read the file ~/.claude/haystack.txt and find every paragraph containing "mid-band identifier". 

I need to find confirmed (NOT draft/preliminary/superseded) values for exactly 5 entities: Underholt, Vyport, Westcairn, Xenmore, Ystwyth.

Look for paragraphs that contain "confirmed-by-regional-verification-panel" phrasing. Exclude any paragraphs marked as "draft", "preliminary", or "superseded".

For each of the 5 entities, report:
1. The entity name
2. The value associated with "mid-band identifier" 
3. Whether the paragraph is confirmed or a decoy (draft/preliminary/superseded)
4. The exact paragraph text

Return the confirmed (entity, value) pairs only.

tool_returns.detail: File does not exist. Note: your current working directory is ..
File content (467.4KB) exceeds maximum allowed size (256KB). Use offset and limit parameters to read specific portions of the file, or search for specific content instead of reading the whole file.
